# Sinusoidal Equations, Modeling & Final Review

## Learning Objectives

By the end of this chapter, you will be able to:

- Solve sinusoidal equations for specific input values.
- Carry out the full modeling workflow: data -> equation -> prediction.
- Synthesize precalculus tools across the course in a capstone project.

---

## Solving Sinusoidal Equations

*(Solving for specific t-values.)*

### Concept Check: Solving for a Specific Time {-}

*(To be drafted.)*

## The Full Modeling Workflow

*(Data -> equation -> prediction, worked end-to-end on a seasonal dataset.)*

## Capstone Case Study

*(Predicting a future high-tide time or seasonal pollutant peak from a fitted sinusoidal model.)*

## Practice: Capstone Modeling Project

*(Ties together linear, quadratic, exponential, and trig tools where relevant.)*

## Skills Drills: Mixed Review

*(Mixed review across all chapter types, in preparation for the final exam.)*
